title: Ekkachakkamaai Lyrics Kappal Song Lyrics
stanzas: Ekkachakkamaai Song Lyrics From Kappal Tamil Movie

Oru moongil kaadena
arindhane.
Adhai muththam thandhu
nee anaiththaaye anaithaaye.

Kadhal sooriyan
neeril kulikkum.
kadhal boomiyai
oode uruttum
Kanava thottalil
kadhal parappom vaa..

Oru kadhal kaagamaai
karaindhaene.
Un kadhal koottinil
nulaindhaene.
Vaanam paarkkalam vaa.

En kadhal jadhagam
tholaithaene.
pudhu vattam pottu ne
koduthaaye.
..paarvai nee thaan.

vellai kaagitham nee
adhil vannam theetta vaa
en ennam yaettra vaa..

Kadhal sooriyan
neeril kulikkum.
kadhal boomiyai
oode uruttum
Kanava thottalil
kadhal parappom vaa..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Ekkachakkamaai?

The song Ekkachakkamaai expresses the feelings of love and connection between two people, highlighting the joy and excitement of being in love.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Kappal?

In Kappal, the song plays during a romantic sequence that showcases the blossoming relationship between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Ekkachakkamaai?

The song is sung by Alphonse and Ankitha Mathew, whose voices blend beautifully to create a captivating duet.

Who is the music director for the song?

The music for Ekkachakkamaai is composed by Natarajan Shankaran, known for his catchy and melodious tunes.

When was Ekkachakkamaai released?

The song was released on November 24, 2014, as part of the movie Kappal.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ekkachakkamaai from the movie Kappal beautifully encapsulates the joy of love and connection. It features a playful and romantic vibe, making it perfect for celebrations and special occasions. The lyrics convey a sense of happiness and excitement, evoking feelings of warmth and affection. With its catchy melody and engaging performances, this duet is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the bliss of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ekkachakkamaai from Kappal is a delightful romantic duet that perfectly captures the essence of love and joy. With the enchanting voices of Alphonse and Ankitha Mathew, this song brings a vibrant energy that resonates with listeners. The collaboration of Kabilan's heartfelt lyrics and Natarajan Shankaran's captivating music makes it a must-listen for any romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: You have taken me in a unique way. You have spoken of love in a special manner.
Don't push me away. My heart is not going to be lost.
I have fallen into your eyes. I have risen because you reached out your hand.
I understood the meaning of a single bamboo. You gave it a kiss and embraced everything.
Love is like the sun that bathes in water. Love will swirl around the earth. When dreams touch, love will spread, come on..
You have taken me in a unique way. You have spoken of love in a special manner.
I have fallen in love like a flower. I have gotten entangled in your love. Let's look at the sky together.
Who can we ask.. I have fallen in love. I have seen you with my eyes.
You have taken me in a unique way. You have spoken of love in a special manner.
Don't push me away. My heart is not going to be lost.
I have lost my love's destiny. You have given me a new circle.. it's you who is the gaze.
You are the white paper, come and color it with your feelings..
Love is like the sun that bathes in water. Love will swirl around the earth. When dreams touch, love will spread, come on..
You have taken me in a unique way. You have spoken of love in a special manner.
